content.text:
[cron:eeef1692-7e97-45f3-ad50-814f0afcae29 heartbeat-health-monitor] Run: cd /root/.openclaw/workspace && OUTPUT=$(python3 scripts/heartbeat_health_cron.py 2>&1); EXIT_CODE=$?; if [ $EXIT_CODE -eq 2 ]; then ALERT_MSG=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | grep '^ALERT_MESSAGE::' | sed 's/^ALERT_MESSAGE:://'); if [ -n "$ALERT_MSG" ]; then message(action=send, channel=telegram, target=7924461837, message="$ALERT_MSG"); else echo "Failed to extract alert message from output: $OUTPUT"; fi; else echo "Heartbeat health check completed with exit code $EXIT_CODE"; fi
Current time: Tuesday, April 7th, 2026 — 5:00 PM (UTC) / 2026-04-07 17:00 UTC
